_comment: THE THEME REGISTER — PREREG_UNIVERSE_CURATION §11 Rule 0. The recorded hypothesis layer: operator-authored falsifiable theses + named deterministic sources + default cluster routing + provenance. NEVER loaded by the trading loop (config.universe.themes stays the loop-facing basket; this file is the auditable rule artifact + per-window admission record). Changes = dated operator amendments. provenance: 'operator' | 'generated' (reserved, PREREG_THEME_GENERATION_STUB.md).

nuclear_fuel.thesis: Global reactor life-extensions/restarts + the SMR pipeline outrun the uranium fuel cycle's mine + conversion/enrichment capacity; fuel-chain and reactor-tech names reprice before the buildout is consensus-priced.
nuclear_fuel.falsifier: Mine/enrichment capacity additions clear demand without sustained term-price escalation; SMR pipeline stalls (cancellations outpace orders).

grid_equipment.thesis: AI-datacenter interconnection demand outruns grid electrical-equipment supply (transformers, conduit, storage, superconductors), pushing multi-year backlogs at second-order suppliers the buildout narrative under-covers.
grid_equipment.falsifier: Equipment lead times normalize / datacenter capex digestion; backlogs shrink for 2+ consecutive quarters.
sources: GRID constituent file (ftportfolios.com etfholdings GRID, fetched 2026-06-09)

copper_supply.thesis: Electrification + grid/datacenter buildout copper demand against structurally constrained mine supply (the themes.json FCX hand-seed thesis, extended to the supply-chain basket).
copper_supply.falsifier: Mine supply growth or substitution closes the deficit; copper term structure stays flat through the buildout.

space_smallcap.thesis: Launch-cost deflation expands constellation / in-space-services demand faster than small-cap space revenue is priced; the primes are consensus, the small-cap supply chain is not.
space_smallcap.falsifier: Launch cadence or constellation capex stalls; small-cap space revenue misses compound for 2+ quarters.

silver_deficit.thesis: A structural silver supply deficit — industrial + solar (PV) demand outrunning constrained primary mine supply and falling above-ground stocks — drives sustained higher realized silver prices for primary silver producers; the deficit is under-narrated relative to gold/precious-metals coverage.
silver_deficit.falsifier: Mine supply growth, recycling, or demand substitution closes the deficit; silver fails to escalate through 2+ consecutive deficit-year prints.
sources: SIL constituent file (Global X Silver Miners ETF, stockanalysis.com/etf/sil/holdings, fetched 2026-06-22)
SLVP constituent file (iShares MSCI Global Silver & Metals Miners, fetched 2026-06-22)

seaborne_freight.thesis: A constrained seaborne fleet (low orderbook, aging vessels, IMO scrapping) against resilient ton-mile demand tightens freight rates for vessel operators; the rate cycle is under-narrated relative to the broad-market beta the names trade on.
seaborne_freight.falsifier: Newbuild deliveries / demand softening loosen freight rates; spot rates fall for 2+ consecutive quarters against the orderbook thesis.
sources: BOAT constituent file (SonicShares Global Shipping ETF, stockanalysis.com/etf/boat/holdings, fetched 2026-06-22)

desalination_efficiency.thesis: ERII's narrative sits on its CO2-refrigeration pivot, leaving the core pressure-exchanger desalination franchise under-attended as large reverse-osmosis capacity enters award/build; the un-priced repricing is a desal bookings/backlog inflection, not the refrigeration story the tape watches.
desalination_efficiency.falsifier: Thesis-retention falsifier (OTM holds the tail; informs universe retention/re-entry, NOT a mid-life exit; never price). Dies if by entry+12mo desal-segment bookings/backlog show no >=30% step-up (window-end point-in-time desal backlog vs trailing-4Q-average at entry; baseline verified from the latest 10-Q at pin). The 'major RO award names ERII content' leg is confirmatory only, NOT a kill condition (ERII SWRO pressure-exchanger near-monopoly makes it near-vacuous).

1.rule: PREREG_UNIVERSE_CURATION §11 Rule 1 — sources ∩ US-listed-optionable ∩ feasibility (1 contract ≤ $1,000 + existing floors) ∩ achieved-OTM 15–35%

excluded_band.LTBR: achieved 9.2% (near-ATM; coarse $2.5 grid on a $9 spot)
excluded_band.IE: achieved -30.4% (only-eligible contract is ITM — the chain cannot express the structure; the band's recorded motivation)
excluded_band.GSAT: achieved -19.8% (ITM-only eligibility; also fails fit at $1,755)

deferred_recall_unverified.BKSY: space_smallcap candidate — no constituent verification yet (window #2)
deferred_recall_unverified.SPIR: space_smallcap candidate — no constituent verification yet (window #2)

1.notes: defense_smallcap: no admissible names this window (DRS band-fail; MRCY/AVAV fit-fail) — basket NOT created. Cluster re-partition recorded in config _comment (CCJ→nuclear_fuel, FCX→copper_supply, RKLB→space_smallcap, grid names→ai_capex_power). Screen ran 2026-06-09 ~23:31 UTC on after-hours OPRA quotes; ADV on SIP bars.

2.rule: PREREG_UNIVERSE_CURATION §11 Rule 1 + §10 off-cycle deploy-warrant. sources ∩ US-listed-optionable ∩ feasibility (1 contract ≤ $1,000) ∩ achieved-OTM 15–35%. The admitted names also read under_narrated=True in the live council re-scores (the silver/freight survivors) where the AI-power/nuclear cluster read False; at_inflection is the remaining market-dependent leg.
screen_records: ephemeral live checks 2026-06-22 (cap-fit OPRA + achieved-OTM + council under_narrated re-score; ~/cap_check_survivors.py + ~/survivor_rescore.py)

excluded_band.STNG: achieved 9.2% (near-ATM; the eligible far-OTM wing is illiquid — like window #1's LTBR/ITRI)
excluded_band.SBLK: achieved -5.7% (ITM-only eligibility; the chain cannot express the 25%-OTM structure — like window #1's IE/GSAT)

excluded_no_structure: AMPH (pharma-reshoring — no listed options chain; pharma_reshoring basket NOT created)
2.notes: OFF-CYCLE admission. The generator's OWN theses were NOT admitted — 8/9 of its cap-fittable names were already in the universe AND the council reads them narrated (the generator framing did not move under_narrated; gen_rescore 0/17). The silver/freight SURVIVORS (parallel-research, 2026-06-22) are the genuine quiet+fittable candidates: FRO/CDE read under_narrated=True, all admitted are cheap on the IV gate + cap-fittable. Two NEW clusters (silver_deficit, seaborne_freight). Stales the §5 four-scan DISCOVERY baseline (a measurement, not a safety gate; re-measurable from a fresh window) — operator-accepted, to position quiet candidates ahead of their at_inflection break.
